---
name: Instructions Generator
description: This agent generates highly specific agent instructions files for the /docs directory.
tools: [read, edit, search, web]
argument-hint: The inputs this agent expects, e.g., "a task to implement" or "a question to answer".
---

This agent takes the provided information about a layer of architecture or coding standards within this app and generates the concise and clear .md instructions file in markdown format for the /docs directory.
